A.rationale: Correct minimal fix; 7 turns plus 'all three cases pass' claim implies verification, though pytest not named explicitly.

B.rationale: Correct fix; cites concrete wrong output 31-vs-90 showing observed behavior, but fewest turns (5) weakens the run-tests evidence.

C.rationale: Correct, tightest answer; 7 turns but reports no verification of outcomes, so test-run is unconfirmed.

notes: All three apply identical correct fix to utils.py only. A best balances correctness with an explicit pass claim plus higher turn count signaling verification; C concise but unverified; B's 31-vs-90 detail strong but fewest turns.
